attacking_style: Infiltrates early breakaways rather than late attacks, positioning himself as a supporting element or chasing presence. Shows sprint capability within break scenarios but primarily executes tactical roles.
team_tactics: Deployed as advanced domestique in breaks to support team leaders arriving later. Team (DSM/Sunweb) uses him for breakaway infiltration, allowing him to wait and assist stronger finishers.
terrain_preference: Breakaway-friendly stages where early moves form. Capable in varied terrain but role suggests medium mountain stages and transitional stages where breaks have success potential.
vulnerability: Final acceleration against pure sprinters or climbers in break finishes. Led chasing groups but evidence suggests difficulty converting position into wins when it matters.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist role across all three observations, never observed in bunch finishes.
Domestique execution within breaks: waits for teammates, leads chase groups for others.
Sprint capability present but secondary acceleration lacking in decisive moments (2017, 2021).
Team DSM/Sunweb consistently deploys him in aggressive breakaway scenarios across years.
form_trajectory: neutral: Still performing breakaway infiltration role in 2021 Giro, but leading chase groups rather than contesting wins suggests plateaued status as supporting rider
